blockingIssues.description: Empty-relay inline validation is unreachable because submitAttempted only flips in submit handler while Create CTA is disabled when relay list is empty.
Sponsor onboard dispatch targets sponsor self pubkey/share, preventing successful new-device sponsorship outcomes.
Concurrent onboarding ceremonies are not isolated per request_id; single onboardSponsorSession state is overwritten.
Onboard completions map to INFO in event log; required ONBOARD-tagged representation is missing.
Multi-device spec still simulates adoption via seeding and only asserts awaiting_adoption, not full sponsor->requester handshake completion.
Updated e2e path is inconsistent with pool-gated mutator preconditions (missing unadoptedSharesCiphertext seed and password mismatch).
Rotate regression test bypasses rotate->distribute->adopt integration by direct runtime seeding.
Old-share invalidation is inferred from material differences instead of direct failed old-share protocol assertion.
Visual parity compares against app-generated baselines instead of igloo-paper source screenshots.
Asymmetric B ±120s vs A clock-skew scenario is not tested (only ±25s asymmetric; ±120s symmetric).
Long-session criteria allow pass with only one successful sign and one successful ECDH across all iterations.
Security snapshot helper stores live references, so all checkpoints can collapse to final state and miss transient leaks.
Secret scanner allow-list over-masks wrapper keys and suppresses scanning for non-bfprofile strings under those keys.
Bridge-driven createSession reset does not clear createSessionPackageSecretsRef, leaving plaintext package secrets retrievable.
Deviation doc route is incorrect (`/onboard-sponsor/package` vs actual `/onboard-sponsor/handoff`).

appliedUpdates.description: Added canonical `lint` and `format_check` commands to `.factory/services.yaml` to align shared command catalog with m7-final-gates scripts in package.json.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether project-scoped Playwright guards (`test.skip(testInfo.project.name !== "desktop")`) are allowed under the current "No `.skip` additions" rule.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple milestone specs use project-scoped skip guards while AGENTS has a blanket prohibition, causing repeated scrutiny observations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten followedProcedure guidance and agent-browser requirements: when omitted, require explicit deviation reporting and consistent pass/fail semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Repeated scrutiny observations across m7 reviews report agent-browser omission or RED-first gaps while handoffs still mark followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile contract assertions that conflict with runtime/docs reality (e.g., ONBOARD event badge taxonomy, VAL-ONBOARD-017 paper-artboard/demo-scenario requirement, offline-trigger wording drift).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports repeatedly flagged contract-vs-implementation mismatches that are currently undocumented in mission-level guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Route docs-only and verification-only features to a matching validator/docs skill instead of UI/protocol implementation skills.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m7-sw-staleness-and-deviation-doc and m7-final-gates produced repeated process deviations due to skill mismatch rather than code defects.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new `.factory/library` entry for self-peer UnknownPeer sponsorship caveat immediately.
Add `.factory/library` note for clock-skew/max_future_skew constraints from m7-clock-skew-and-leak.
Promote single-feature handoff anomalies (e.g., known pre-existing issue re-reported once) into immediate shared-state file edits.
